name: Ricky Nelson
abstract: Eric Hilliard "Ricky" or “Rick” Nelson (May 8, 1940 – December 31, 1985) was an American musician and actor. From age eight, he starred alongside his family in the radio and television series The Adventures of Ozzie and Harriet.

about_quotes.speaker: Luis Conte
about_quotes.evidence: Ricky Nelson – I forget now some of the others. Gene Vincent. She had all these records of all these guys. So I grew up listening to the stuff in the house
about_quotes.doc_title: Luis Conte interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 24, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Conrad "Connie" Jones
about_quotes.evidence: That's the one with that memorable recording of Rick Nelson screaming, do you know what it means to Miss New Orleans? I'm so proud of.

about_quotes.speaker: Wild Bill Davison
about_quotes.evidence: I took you know, like Joe Barufaldi, Ricky Nelson - a guy named Pruitt on bass and it was a great band
